# Brams Mind Care

> Evidence-based online psychiatric care by Dr. Jyotika Kanwar, a board-certified consultant psychiatrist. Confidential video consultations for anxiety, depression, adult ADHD, and trauma, available to patients across India.

Brams Mind Care is an online-only psychiatric practice. All consultations are conducted over a secure, encrypted video link. Patients book a slot, pay online, and receive a Google Meet link by email. Digital prescriptions are issued where clinically appropriate and delivered to a private patient dashboard.

## Clinician
- Dr. Jyotika Kanwar — Consultant Psychiatrist (Psychiatry). Treats anxiety and panic disorders, depression, adult ADHD, and trauma recovery using psychotherapy guidance and medication management when clinically appropriate.

## Consultation plans
- Follow-up — ₹1,000, 20–30 min (returning patients: medication management, progress assessment)
- Initial Consultation — ₹2,000, 45–60 min (new patients: full diagnostic evaluation, personalized treatment plan)
- Priority Plus — ₹3,000, 90 min (urgent same-day support, guaranteed 24-hour booking)

## Key pages
- [Home](https://bramsmindcare.com/): Overview, services, pricing, and FAQ
- [Book a consultation](https://bramsmindcare.com/book): Choose a plan, pick a time, and pay
- [Contact](https://bramsmindcare.com/contact): Get in touch with the practice
- [Emergency resources](https://bramsmindcare.com/emergency-contact): Crisis helplines and guidance
- [Privacy policy](https://bramsmindcare.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms](https://bramsmindcare.com/terms)
- [Confidentiality](https://bramsmindcare.com/confidentiality)

## Notes
- Service area: all of India (online only).
- Brams Mind Care is not an emergency service. In a crisis, contact local emergency services or India's iCall helpline at +91-9152987821.
- Contact: support@bramsmindcare.com
